rationale: The citing paper appears to reference Chintagunta (2002) only as prior empirical precedent when arguing that promotion decisions are planned infrequently and can be treated as exogenous in its toothpaste example. The citation is grouped with another source and does not play a distinct role in developing the 2sCOPE method, proofs, simulations, or core hypotheses. There is no direct reuse or extension of the cited paper's model or findings beyond this brief contextual support.
